home.create_tags_hint: Create tags to group related notes into knowledge domains

search.placeholder: Search notes by title or content...

writing.activity_calendar_desc: Your daily writing activity over the past 12 months

settings.title: Settings
settings.reset_workspace_desc: Permanently delete all your notes and data
settings.reset_warning: Warning: This will permanently delete all data in this workspace.
settings.reset_list_notes: All your notes will be gone
settings.reset_list_links: All graph connections will be lost
settings.reset_list_profile: Your profile settings will be reset
settings.export_workspace_desc: Download all your notes as a single file
settings.export_path_desc: Where your notes will be exported by default
settings.media_path_desc: Custom directory to store images and attachments
settings.import_workspace_desc: Import notes from a Bloom JSON or Markdown files
settings.widget_desc: Configure desktop widgets for quick access
settings.widget_on_startup_desc: Automatically show the planner widget when Bloom starts, even without opening the main app
settings.quick_capture_widget_desc: Open quick capture as a floating widget instead of inside the main app

editor.tip_wikilink: Type [[ to link to other notes, or / for commands

tags_picker.no_tags_yet: No tags yet. Create one below.

storage.no_notes: No notes yet. Create your first note to see storage usage.

account.verification_hint: A verification link will be sent to your new email
account.delete_hint: Permanently delete your account and all data
account.delete_warning: This action is permanent and irreversible. All your data including:

notes.no_backlinks: No notes link to this one yet
notes.backlinks_tip: Type [[{note title}]] in other notes to create connections.

tags.no_tags: No tags yet. Create one below.
tags.delete_tag_desc: This will remove the tag from all notes. The notes themselves will not be deleted.

help.title: Bloom Help
help.wikilinks_desc: Connect your notes by typing [[note name]]. This creates a clickable link that lets you navigate between related ideas instantly.
help.wikilinks_tip: Type [[ and start typing to see suggestions!
help.tags_desc: Organize notes into knowledge domains using tags. Create categories like Projects, Ideas, or Research to keep your garden tidy.
help.tags_tip: Click the tag icon in any note to add or create tags.
help.graph_desc: Visualize all your note connections with an interactive 3D graph. Features Hebbian learning to strengthen frequently accessed connections.
help.graph_tip: Press Ctrl+G to open Graph View. Click nodes to navigate!
help.planner_desc: Plan your day with time blocks, set targets, and track progress. Create schedules, manage tasks, and review your daily achievements.
help.planner_tip: Use time blocks to structure your day and set daily targets to stay focused.
help.writing_desc: Track your daily word count with GitHub-style activity calendar. Set daily goals and see your writing streak visualized over time.
help.writing_tip: View your writing heatmap on the home page to stay motivated!
help.quick_capture_desc: Capture ideas instantly with a floating quick capture widget. Press Alt+Shift+N anywhere on your system to open it.
help.quick_capture_tip: Enable 'Quick Capture as Widget' in Widget settings for always-on-top capture window.
help.templates_desc: Use pre-built templates for common note types: daily notes, weekly reviews, meeting notes, and more. Save time with consistent structure.
help.templates_tip: Access templates from the sidebar or use slash commands (/) in the editor.
help.starred_desc: Mark your most important notes with a star for quick access. Perfect for frequently referenced notes or current projects.
help.starred_tip: Click the star icon in any note to toggle.
help.search_desc: Find any note instantly with powerful full-text search. Search by title, content, or tags with FTS5 indexing for speed.
help.command_palette_desc: Press Ctrl+K to access all commands, quick navigation, and actions in one place.

tips.connect_thoughts_desc: Type [[note name]] anywhere to create links between your notes. Your ideas will grow stronger together.
tips.organize_garden_desc: Use tags to create knowledge domains. Group related notes and find them faster when you need them.
tips.watch_grow_desc: Open Graph View (Ctrl+G) to see all your note connections visualized. Discover hidden patterns in your thinking!
tips.daily_planner_desc: Use the Daily Planner to create time blocks and set targets. Structure your day and track progress in real-time.
tips.track_progress_desc: Your writing activity is automatically tracked. Check the home page to see your daily word count heatmap!
tips.quick_capture_desc: Press Alt+Shift+N anywhere to open quick capture. Never lose a thought again!

list.title: Title
list.delete_notes_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the selected notes.
list.no_starred_hint: You haven't starred any notes yet. Star notes to quickly access them here.
list.no_tag_notes_hint: No notes with this tag yet.
list.no_notes_hint: Create your first note to get started on your knowledge journey.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try reloading the page.

planning.no_targets_hint: Add targets to plan your day and track your progress.
planning.no_time_blocks_hint: Click a time slot to create a block.
planning.target_title_placeholder: What do you want to accomplish?
planning.review_notes_placeholder: Reflect on your day... What went well? What could be improved?
planning.delete_target_desc: This will permanently remove this target.
planning.delete_time_block_desc: This will permanently remove this time block.

welcome.title: Welcome to Bloom Notes
welcome.subtitle: Your personal second brain — private, offline, and beautifully connected.
welcome.feature_write_desc: A distraction-free editor with powerful wikilinks, tags, and instant search.
welcome.editor_body: Today I explored a new concept about networked thinking and how ideas connect naturally...
welcome.feat_wikilinks_desc: Connect your notes with [[wikilinks]] to build a web of knowledge.
welcome.feat_tags_desc: Organize notes with tags, starring, and smart search.
welcome.feat_search_desc: Find anything in milliseconds across all your notes.
welcome.feature_think_desc: Visualize how your ideas connect in a beautiful, interactive graph.
welcome.feat_graph_desc: See the big picture of how all your notes are interconnected.
welcome.feat_discover_desc: Find hidden relationships between your ideas you never noticed.
welcome.feature_plan_desc: Plan your day with time-blocked schedules and track your writing activity.
welcome.feat_planner_desc: Time-block your day and track progress with an intuitive planner.
welcome.feat_activity_desc: Visualize your writing habits with a GitHub-style activity heatmap.
welcome.workspace_desc: Give your second brain a name. Everything is stored locally on your device.
